Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class FlowScreenField

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.FlowBaseElement
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.FlowElement
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.FlowScreenField
public class FlowScreenField extends FlowElement

Java class for FlowScreenField complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="FlowScreenField">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowElement">
       <sequence>
         <element name="choiceReferences" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dataType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowDataType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dataTypeMappings" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowDataTypeMapping" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultSelectedChoiceReference" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultValue" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowElementReferenceOrValue" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="extensionName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="fieldText" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="fieldType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowScreenFieldType"/>
         <element name="fields" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowScreenField" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="helpText" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="inputParameters" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowScreenFieldInputParameter" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="inputsOnNextNavToAssocScrn" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowScreenFieldInputsRevisited" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isRequired" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isVisible" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="objectFieldReference" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="outputParameters" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowScreenFieldOutputParameter" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="regionContainerType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowRegionContainerType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="scale" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="storeOutputAutomatically" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="validationRule" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowInputValidationRule" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="visibilityRule" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FlowVisibilityRule" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Method Details

    • getChoiceReferences

      public List<String> getChoiceReferences()
      Gets the value of the choiceReferences property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the choiceReferences property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getChoiceReferences().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the choiceReferences property.

    • getDataType

      public FlowDataType getDataType()
      Gets the value of the dataType property.
      Returns:
      possible object is FlowDataType

    • setDataType

      public void setDataType(FlowDataType value)
      Sets the value of the dataType property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is FlowDataType

    • getDataTypeMappings

      public List<FlowDataTypeMapping> getDataTypeMappings()
      Gets the value of the dataTypeMappings property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the dataTypeMappings property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getDataTypeMappings().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list FlowDataTypeMapping

      Returns:
      The value of the dataTypeMappings property.

    • getFields

      public List<FlowScreenField> getFields()
      Gets the value of the fields property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the fields property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getFields().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list FlowScreenField

      Returns:
      The value of the fields property.
